change_summary: Generate a monthly invoice from metered billable units with a per-line breakdown and totals.
critical_invariants: Invoice totals equal the sum of line items; no rounding drift across currencies.
An invoice is generated at most once per tenant per billing period (idempotent).
requirement_closure: Ticket ask: Monthly invoice generation from metered usage (billing).
Implemented (in progress): line-item builder over BILL-201 billable units; total reconciliation underway.
repo_gates: cd backend && npm run build [result=pass; attribution=clean] - tsc clean (partial)

self_review_cycles.findings: totals reconciled to line items; banker's rounding unit-tested
idempotency key per (tenant, period); tenant-scoped read
